title: Deliciously Energizing Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and energizing Brazilian dish featuring chicken skewers marinated in a winey and paleo-friendly mixture, served with a side of unsalted butter for added richness.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, or about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together melted butter, red wine vinegar, coconut oil, garlic, ginger, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
Serve with a side of grilled vegetables or a salad for a well-rounded meal.
